infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Share a Beer uses the camera to recognize beers from labels.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Share a Beer uses your location to tag posts and sessions (optional).
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Share a Beer uses your photos to attach them to beer posts.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Share a Beer does not track you across other companies' apps.

plugins.cameraPermission: Share a Beer uses the camera to recognize beers from labels.
